zh.lifeSummary: 當Isobell Crichton於1500年出生在蘇格蘭艾丁波時，她的父親Sir Robert II Crichton, Second Lord Crichton of Sanquhar28歲，母親Marion Margaret Maxwell28歲。她於1520年與James Corant Hill在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1547年9月10日在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波享年47歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波。

nameMeanings.name: Crichton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Creighton
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from Crichton, near Edinburgh, first recorded c. 1128 in the form Crectune, in 1287 as Crecton, and in 1360 as Creychtona. The name is probably an early hybrid compound of Old Welsh creic ‘rock’ + Older Scots tun ‘farm, settlement’ (Old English tūn). In Ireland and Britain, this form of the name is now found chiefly in northern Ireland; the more usual Scottish forms are Crichton and Crighton .
Irish: sometimes used for Gaelic Ó Creacháin or Ó Criocháin (see Crehan ).
English: habitational name from Creighton in Staffordshire, named with Celtic creig ‘rock’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Isobell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isobell Crichton was born in 1500, in Edinburgh, Scotland, her father, Sir Robert II Crichton, Second Lord Crichton of Sanquhar, was 28 and her mother, Marion Margaret Maxwell, was 28. She married James Corant Hill in 1520, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 10 September 1547, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isobell Crichton est née en 1500, à Edinburgh, Écosse, son père, Sir Robert II Crichton, Second Lord Crichton of Sanquhar, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Marion Margaret Maxwell, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé James Corant Hill en 1520, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 septembre 1547, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1520 in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom James Corant Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. September 1547 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato James Corant Hill nel 1520, nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: Isobell Crichton(이)가 1500년 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert II Crichton, Second Lord Crichton of Sanquhar(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marion Margaret Maxwell(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1520년 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 James Corant Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1547년 9월 10일 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isobell Crichton nasceu em 1500, em Edinburgh, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Robert II Crichton, Second Lord Crichton of Sanquhar, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Marion Margaret Maxwell, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com James Corant Hill em 1520, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1547, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Sanquhar Castle, Dumfries and Galloway,: санкухар, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isobell Crichton родилась в 1500 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert II Crichton, Second Lord Crichton of Sanquhar было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Marion Margaret Maxwell, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Corant Hill в 1520 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 10 сентября 1547 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания.
